name: documents_v2
notes: Queried by GET /api/documents/:id/preview to retrieve file_path (to locate the binary on disk) and file_type (to set the Content-Type response header); the query uses SELECT * but only those two columns are consumed.

This DB read is conditional: it only fires when the selected document has a previewable MIME type (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif). Clicking a document with a non-previewable type (e.g., text/plain) does not trigger any DB access.
